issues: Incorrect rebalance_frequency: spec requires weekly but code uses daily.
Code uses 'volume' column which is not provided by 'price_only' adapter (only 'date' and 'value' columns are returned).
Code calculates 'weekly_price_return' from 'value' column but spec expects weekly frequency data; code does not resample or ensure weekly frequency.
Entry and exit logic mostly matches spec but code relies on unavailable 'volume' data, violating adapter contract.
Signal logic uses correct conditions but on unavailable data, so logic cannot be fulfilled as per spec.

Allocation logic caps allocation_per_signal at max_total_exposure incorrectly; should accumulate signals up to max_total_exposure, but code just uses min(0.05,0.20) which is always 0.05 (not a failure but simplistic).
